blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
